metadata.description: A harness for reproducible, STAMPED-aligned data-science research. Workflow-plane planner skills (project, analyze) delegate to capability-plane doers (datalad, datalad-cli, nipoppy-cli) so every research object is Shareable, Tracked, Actionable, Metadata-rich, Provenanced, Executable, and Distributable.

plugins.name: project
plugins.description: Project lifecycle planner: scaffold a new YODA/BIDS DataLad study and orient a researcher (coordinator agent) on where a project stands.

plugins.name: analyze
plugins.description: Analysis planner: propose comparisons on their own branch, run them with full (optionally containerized) provenance, and checkpoint clean snapshots.

plugins.name: datalad
plugins.description: DataLad doer: the tool subagent that executes all DataLad / git-annex operations with provenance on behalf of the planner skills.

plugins.name: datalad-cli
plugins.description: DataLad skill toolbox: 19 focused skills wrapping individual datalad subcommands (create, run, save, container-run, siblings, push, ...).

plugins.name: nipoppy-cli
plugins.description: Nipoppy skill toolbox: dataset curation, BIDS conversion, pipeline running/tracking, and IDP extraction for neuroimaging studies.
